description: Style Note Stylish to a T, these tights from adidas are engineered with climalite technology and designed to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The comfortable waistband sits snugly, offering a flattering Fit. Team it with performance t-shirts and sports shoes for that smart, sporty look Product Details Purple patterned tights with an elasticated waistband, has an tubular, almost seamless construction with flat seams that offers exemplary comfort, eliminating rubbing or chafing Material and Care 92% nylon and 8% elastane Machine wash with like colours at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry, iron, or dry clean Do not use fabric softners Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size XS
